issues.description: Race condition in lazy initialization. The code uses atomic.LoadPointer for a fast path, but multiple goroutines can simultaneously enter the slow path (lines 40-52) because there is no mutex or sync.Once guarding the initialization logic. This leads to redundant work in 'initializeResource' and potential state corruption if the resource is intended to be a unique singleton.

false_positive_traps.description: The use of 'unsafe.Pointer' is necessary for atomic operations on arbitrary types in Go and is not inherently a bug here.
The 'atomic.LoadPointer' on line 36 is a correct performance optimization for the 'hot path' read.
